positive: A highly stylized, bioluminescent jungle scene at night, featuring large, sweeping ferns and exotic, glowing flora. The primary subject is a central arrangement of interconnected glowing roots and oversized monstera leaves, contrasted against a deep, midnight indigo sky filled with stylized constellations. The lighting should be dramatic rim-lighting, emanating only from the bioluminescent elements, creating strong silhouettes and glowing edges. Composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed for seamless textile printing. Style should be a blend of graphic illustration and neo-art deco digital painting, utilizing rich jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, deep violet) and high contrast luminosity. Extremely crisp lines, vector-like precision, perfect symmetry, forest aesthetic, ethereal, mystical atmosphere.
negative: blurry, noisy, grain, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, out of frame, distorted, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, simple, plain, cartoonish, monochrome
